name: Operation Community Uplift
tagline: Large-scale community transformation — organized, sustained, and impactful.
overview: Operation Community Uplift (OCU) is E100's civic engagement committee. OCU organizes voter registration drives, civic education events, community beautification initiatives like the December Street Clean-Up, and non-partisan civic forums. OCU shows up for Atlanta as a citizen organization — never endorsing candidates, always advancing civic participation. Non-partisan. Always.
